name: tailnet_status
description: Report the state of the local tailnet: this node plus all peers with hostname, MagicDNS name, Tailscale IPv4/IPv6, OS, online flag, last seen, exit-node flags, and tags.

onlineOnly.description: Only include peers that are currently online (default: false)

name: generate_ssh_config
description: Generate ssh-config Host blocks for tailnet nodes (MagicDNS name preferred, Tailscale IP fallback). Dry-run by default; write=true writes ~/.ssh/tailscale_dev_config; target="user_ssh_config" edits ~/.ssh/config idempotently between managed markers.

write.description: Actually write the config (default: false = dry-run, text only)

target.description: Write target: dedicated_file (default) or user_ssh_config (managed markers)

onlineOnly.description: Only include peers that are currently online (default: false)

user.description: Remote user to set on every Host block

name: share_port
description: Share a local port over the tailnet via Tailscale Serve (tailnet-only by default). WARNING: public=true switches to Funnel and exposes the port to the OPEN INTERNET. Returns the resulting URL(s).

public.description: Expose to the open internet via Funnel (default: false = tailnet-only Serve). DANGEROUS.

path.description: HTTPS mount path on the serve endpoint (default: "/")

name: share_status
description: Report the active Tailscale Serve/Funnel sessions on this node.

name: stop_share
description: Stop sharing. Without arguments clears the entire serve/funnel configuration; with httpsPort it turns off just that HTTPS serve endpoint.

httpsPort.description: HTTPS serve port to turn off (as shown in share_status). Omit to clear everything.

name: ping_all
description: Ping tailnet peers concurrently (bounded to 5, one ping each with timeout) and return a latency matrix: node, latency ms, path (direct vs DERP relay), or unreachable.

onlineOnly.description: Only ping peers reported online (default: true)
